description: The 110 LAHR business rules. Each rule applies to a section and, if its condition is true, caps the band at the value given. After all rules are evaluated, the overall property category is the lowest band across sections (and G overrides everything).

rule_result_semantics.cap_band: If the condition is true, the section's band cannot be higher than cap_band.
rule_result_semantics.G_rules: Return G (Not Assessed) overall if the condition is true.

rules.description: More than 4 communal steps without a ramp returns F
More than 4 property steps without a ramp returns F
Combined >4 property+communal steps without ramp returns F
No ramps at all, 1-4 communal steps
Property ramp but no communal ramp, 1-4 communal steps
Communal ramp but no property ramp, 1-4 property steps
Communal door threshold > 10cm is a step
Property door threshold > 10cm is a step
Communal ramp needs a suitable platform at the top
Communal ramp steeper than 1:10 with no alt access or >4 steps
Communal ramp steeper than 1:10 with 1-4 alt steps
Communal ramp between 1:10 and 1:12
Short (<500cm) communal ramp must be <=1:15 for A
Short (<500cm) communal ramp must be <=1:12 for B
Long (>=500cm) communal ramp must be <=1:20 for A
Long (>=500cm) communal ramp must be <=1:15 for B
Property ramp needs a suitable platform at the top
Property ramp >1:10 with no alt access or >4 steps
Property ramp >1:10 with 1-4 alt steps
Property ramp between 1:10 and 1:12
Short (<500cm) property ramp must be <=1:15 for A
Short (<500cm) property ramp must be <=1:12 for B
Long (>=500cm) property ramp must be <=1:20 for A
Long (>=500cm) property ramp must be <=1:15 for B
Communal front door needs >=80cm for A
Communal door <75cm caps at E
Communal door threshold 1.5-10cm caps at E
Property front door needs >=80cm for A
Property door <75cm (doc says 77.5) caps at E
Property door threshold 1.5-10cm caps at E
More than 3 steps at second exit without ramp returns F
1-3 steps at second exit without ramp
Second exit threshold >10cm is a step
Second exit ramp needs a suitable platform
Second exit ramp >1:10 with no alt or >3 steps
Second exit ramp >1:10 with 1-3 alt steps
Second exit ramp between 1:10 and 1:12
Short (<500cm) second exit ramp must be <=1:15 for A
Short (<500cm) second exit ramp must be <=1:12 for B
Long (>=500cm) second exit ramp must be <=1:20 for A
Long (>=500cm) second exit ramp must be <=1:15 for B
Second exit door >=80cm for A
Second exit door >=75cm (doc says 77.5) for B
Internal stairs without through-floor or platform lift cannot be A
Internal stairs + essential facilities not all on access level + no lift caps at C
rules.condition: InternalStairs == 'Yes' AND (NOT (FacilitiesAccessLevelBed1 OR FacilitiesAccessLevelBed2) OR NOT (FacilitiesAccessLevelBathroom OR FacilitiesAccessLevelSepToilet OR FacilitiesAccessLevelCombBathroom) OR NOT FacilitiesAccessLevelLivingRoom OR NOT FacilitiesAccessLevelKitchen) AND ThroughFloorLift == 'No' AND PlatformLift == 'No'

rules.description: Through-floor lift smaller than 108.5 x 72.5 cm (dim1 > dim2)
rules.condition: ThroughFloorLift == 'Yes' AND EssentialFacilitiesBand == 'A' AND ThroughFloorLiftDimensionsA > ThroughFloorLiftDimensionsB AND (ThroughFloorLiftDimensionsA < 108.5 OR ThroughFloorLiftDimensionsB < 72.5)

rules.description: Through-floor lift smaller than 108.5 x 72.5 cm (dim2 > dim1)
rules.condition: ThroughFloorLift == 'Yes' AND EssentialFacilitiesBand == 'A' AND ThroughFloorLiftDimensionsA < ThroughFloorLiftDimensionsB AND (ThroughFloorLiftDimensionsB < 108.5 OR ThroughFloorLiftDimensionsA < 72.5)

rules.description: Through-floor lift square but smaller than 108.5
rules.condition: ThroughFloorLift == 'Yes' AND EssentialFacilitiesBand == 'A' AND ThroughFloorLiftDimensionsA == ThroughFloorLiftDimensionsB AND (ThroughFloorLiftDimensionsA < 108.5 OR ThroughFloorLiftDimensionsB < 108.5)

rules.description: Communal lift door <80cm caps at D
Communal lift internal <110 x 140cm caps at D (dim1 > dim2)
rules.condition: CommunalLift == 'Yes' AND ServicingLiftInternalDimensionsA > ServicingLiftInternalDimensionsB AND (ServicingLiftInternalDimensionsA < 140 OR ServicingLiftInternalDimensionsB < 110)

rules.description: Communal lift internal <110 x 140cm caps at D (dim2 > dim1)
rules.condition: CommunalLift == 'Yes' AND ServicingLiftInternalDimensionsA < ServicingLiftInternalDimensionsB AND (ServicingLiftInternalDimensionsB < 140 OR ServicingLiftInternalDimensionsA < 110)

rules.description: Communal lift internal square <140cm caps at D
rules.condition: CommunalLift == 'Yes' AND ServicingLiftInternalDimensionsA == ServicingLiftInternalDimensionsB AND (ServicingLiftInternalDimensionsA < 140 OR ServicingLiftInternalDimensionsB < 140)

rules.description: A or B property must have wheelchair/scooter storage
Storage <160 x 100cm caps at B (dim1 > dim2)
Storage <160 x 100cm caps at B (dim2 > dim1)
Storage square <160cm caps at B
Storage <120 x 70cm caps at C (dim1 > dim2)
Storage <120 x 70cm caps at C (dim2 > dim1)
Storage square <100cm caps at C
A or B needs 100cm side transfer at separate toilet
rules.condition: SeparateToilet == 'Yes' AND (CombToiletSideWallSpace < 100 OR CombToiletSideWallSpace is blank) AND ToiletSideWallSpace < 100

rules.description: Separate toilet must be >=200 x 170cm for A (dim1 > dim2)
Separate toilet must be >=200 x 170cm for A (dim2 > dim1)
Separate toilet square <200cm for A
Bathroom must have 150 x 150cm turning for A or B
4+ person property must have separate toilet for A or B
6+ person property must have separate toilet for A, B or C
6+ person separate toilet must be >=170 x 140cm (dim1 > dim2)
rules.condition: NoofBeds >= 6 AND SeparateToiletA > SeparateToiletB AND (SeparateToiletA < 170 OR SeparateToiletB < 140)

rules.description: 6+ person separate toilet must be >=170 x 140cm (dim2 > dim1)
rules.condition: NoofBeds >= 6 AND SeparateToiletA < SeparateToiletB AND (SeparateToiletB < 170 OR SeparateToiletA < 140)

rules.description: 6+ person separate toilet square <170cm
rules.condition: NoofBeds >= 6 AND SeparateToiletA == SeparateToiletB AND (SeparateToiletA < 170 OR SeparateToiletB < 170)

rules.description: Property with stairs (3+ beds) or ground-entry must have toilet on access level for A/B/C
rules.condition: ((InternalStairs == 'Yes' AND NoofBedrooms >= 3) OR PropertyEntryLevel == 'Ground') AND FacilitiesAccessLevelCombBathToilet == 'No' AND FacilitiesAccessLevelSepToilet == 'No'

rules.description: Bathroom needs 150 x 150cm turning + lateral toilet space (unless separate toilet) for A or B
A or B property must have level access shower
Toilet in A or B needs 100cm lateral transfer space
Head-on hallway must be >=90cm for A-D
rules.condition: HallwayHead < 90 AND HallwayHead is not blank

rules.description: Turning hallway with side doors must be >=120cm for A-C
rules.condition: HallwayTurn < 120 AND HallwayTurn is not blank

rules.description: Turning hallway with side doors must be >=90cm for D
rules.condition: HallwayTurn < 90 AND HallwayTurn is not blank

rules.description: All internal doors >=77.5cm for A
All internal doors >=75cm for B-D
Kitchen needs 150x150 or 140x170cm turning space for A or B
1st floor and above need 2 lifts for A
Basement flats need lift or ramp
Section C stop-now returns F
Section D stop-now returns F
Section E stop-nows return F
Straight stairs <70cm wide or <70cm clearance (if no second exit to street)
rules.condition: StraightStairs == 'Yes' AND ((MoreThan70cm == 'No' AND SecondExitAccesstoStreet == 'No') OR WidthofStairs1 < 70)

rules.description: Curved stairs <75cm wide or <70cm clearance (if no second exit to street)
rules.condition: CurvedStairs == 'Yes' AND ((MoreThan70cm == 'No' AND SecondExitAccesstoStreet == 'No') OR WidthofStairs < 75)

rules.description: Any internal steps makes the property F

sections.label: G Rules — Not Assessed
sections.description: Any of these triggers G (Not Assessed) for the overall property category.

rules.description: Postcode not entered
Both head and turn hallway approaches blank
rules.condition: NoEntranceGroundandNoLift == 'No' AND SectionDEnd == 'No' AND SectionEEnd1 == 'No' AND SectionEEnd2 == 'No' AND InternalSteps == 0 AND HallwayHead1 is blank AND HallwayTurn1 is blank

rules.description: No door widths entered
rules.condition: NoEntranceGroundandNoLift == 'No' AND SectionDEnd == 'No' AND SectionEEnd1 == 'No' AND SectionEEnd2 == 'No' AND InternalSteps == 0 AND ALL_BLANK(Lounge1,SeparateToilet1,Kitchen1,Bathroom1,BedOne1,BedTwo1,BedThree1)

rules.description: Other UPRNs missing when multiple properties indicated
rules.condition: OtherPropertiesAssessed == 'Yes' AND OtherUPRN_1 is blank AND OtherUPRN_2 is blank

rules.description: Communal ramp present but platform not recorded
Property ramp present but platform not recorded
Second exit ramp present but platform not recorded
Property entrance level not recorded
Number of property steps not recorded
Number of internal steps not recorded
rules.condition: NoEntranceGroundandNoLift == 'No' AND SectionDEnd == 'No' AND InternalSteps is blank

rules.description: Communal door present but steps or width missing
rules.condition: CommunalFrontDoor == 'Yes' AND (CommunalFrontDoorNumSteps is blank OR CommunalFrontDoorWidth is blank)

rules.description: Non-ground entrance level but lift count missing
rules.condition: (PropertyEntryLevel == 'Other' OR PropertyEntryLevel == 'Basement') AND NoOfLifts is blank

rules.description: Communal ramp Yes but no ramp type selected
Property ramp Yes but no ramp type selected
Second exit ramp Yes but no ramp type selected
Communal ramp Yes but no measurements
rules.condition: CommunalRamp == 'Yes' AND ALL_BLANK(CommunalRamp*aH, CommunalRamp*aL, CommunalRamp*bH, CommunalRamp*bL)

rules.description: Property ramp Yes but no measurements
rules.condition: PropertyRamp == 'Yes' AND ALL_BLANK(PropertyRamp*aH, PropertyRamp*aL, PropertyRamp*bH, PropertyRamp*bL)

rules.description: Second exit ramp Yes but no measurements
rules.condition: SecondExitRamp == 'Yes' AND ALL_BLANK(SecondExitRamp*aH, SecondExitRamp*aL, SecondExitRamp*bH, SecondExitRamp*bL)

rules.description: Communal ramp Yes/No not ticked
Property ramp Yes/No not ticked
Second exit ramp Yes/No not ticked
rules.condition: SecondExitRamp is blank AND SectionDEnd == 'No' AND NoEntranceGroundandNoLift == 'No' AND InternalSteps == 0

rules.description: Landlord type not recorded
Housing association but name missing

unit_notes.gradient_encoding: Gradient stored as a percentage-style number where 1:10 == 10, 1:12 == 8.33, 1:15 == 6.66, 1:20 == 5. Formula: gradient_value = 100 / ratio_denominator.
unit_notes.length: Ramp lengths in centimetres (cm). Door widths in centimetres. Lift and toilet dimensions in centimetres. Thresholds in centimetres (10 cm == 100 mm).

notes: Assumption: a second exit has direct access to the street without using the communal door or its ramp/steps.
The digital form's step options are 1/2/3/4+. An E+ requires second-exit steps between 1-3; the tighter limit is justified because second exits typically involve longer mobilising distances.

The digital form cannot indicate whether a step lift, stair lift or platform-stair lift can be used to avoid communal or property steps. When relevant, the assessor may record 0 steps (for what the lift avoids) or record the actual steps and manually override the property category.
If two approaches exist (level + ramp), do not record the ramp — it may lower the overall category unnecessarily. If the first path has steps, record all elements as normal.
